title: Mudras in Mother Tantra
description_raw: Meditation course with Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche on Mother Tantra teachings and mudras, held in Wilga, Poland and online.
ai_summary: A hybrid meditation course on Mother Tantra and mudras from the Tibetan Bön tradition, taught by Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche, open to all levels.

title: Exploring the Body of Light
start_local_text: Sat. July 25, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm Central-Chicago Time
description_raw: Khandro Kunzang gives an in-depth teaching on the subtle energy body, according to the yogic teachings of Vajrayana Buddhism, covering channels, winds, their relation to the physical body, and effects of mantras.
ai_summary: An online Vajrayana Buddhist teaching on the subtle body structure and energy channels, exploring embryological formation, winds, perception, and the role of sound and mantras.

title: Exploring the Body of Light
start_local_text: Sun. July 26, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm Central-Chicago Time
description_raw: Khandro Kunzang gives an in-depth teaching on the subtle energy body, according to the yogic teachings of Vajrayana Buddhism, covering channels, winds, their relation to the physical body, and effects of mantras.
ai_summary: An online Vajrayana Buddhist teaching on the subtle body structure and energy channels, exploring embryological formation, winds, perception, and the role of sound and mantras.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama yoga practice combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation, offered online monthly by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche with English and Russian simultaneous translation.
ai_summary: A monthly online Tibetan yoga and pranayama practice session with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche, open to all levels, taught in English and Russian.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama yoga practice combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation, offered online monthly by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche with English and Russian simultaneous translation.
ai_summary: A monthly online Tibetan yoga and pranayama practice session with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche, open to all levels, taught in English and Russian.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama yoga practice combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation, offered online monthly by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche with English and Russian simultaneous translation.
ai_summary: A monthly online Tibetan yoga and pranayama practice session with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche, open to all levels, taught in English and Russian.

title: Natural Freedom Upon Hearing Teachings on the Bardos Part 2
description_raw: Gochen Tulku Sang-ngag Rinpoche teaching on the Bardos Part 2, translated by Vanessa Kubota. Two sessions available: 10:00-12:00 PDT or 2:00-4:00 PDT.
ai_summary: A two-part Tibetan Buddhist teaching on bardo (intermediate) states led by Rinpoche, available in morning or afternoon sessions on Zoom.

title: Teachings on Heart Sutra
description_raw: Teachings by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden on Heart Sutra, 25th July to 3rd August 2026, 11am CET, hosted by Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées onsite and online.
ai_summary: A multi-day teaching retreat on the Heart Sutra led by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden, available both in-person in the Pyrenees and online.

title: 2026 Summer Dzogchen Retreat
description_raw: Dzogchen pith instructions and Vajrakilaya empowerment according to the lineage of Tsasum Lingpa, July 18-25, 2026 at Padma Samye Ling in upstate NY. Available in person and live webcast.
ai_summary: A week-long Vajrayana retreat on Dzogchen teachings and Vajrakilaya empowerment led by Ven. Khenpo Tsewang Dongyal Rinpoche, available both in-person at Padma Samye Ling (upstate NY) and via live webcast.

title: Special Mudras and Practices of Mother Tantra
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaching at Wilga, Poland. Special Mudras and Practices of Mother Tantra. Available online.
ai_summary: A Buddhist tantra teaching on mudras and Mother Tantra practices by a senior Bön lama in Poland, available both in-person and online.

title: Trekchö from the Namkha Trulzod (The Miraculous Treasury of Space)
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaching in Poznań, Poland. Teaching on Trekchö practice from the Namkha Trulzod. Available online.
ai_summary: An advanced Bön Buddhist teaching on Trekchö (direct crossing) practice from a senior lama in Poland, available both in-person and online.

title: Thögal Practice from the Ying Rig Zod (Treasury of the Expanse of Awareness)
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaching in Berlin, Germany. Teaching on Thögal practice from the Ying Rig Zod. Available online.
ai_summary: An advanced Bön Buddhist teaching on Thögal (direct perception) meditation by a senior lama in Berlin, available both in-person and online.

title: Profound Meditation Stages from A-tri Teachings
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaching in Vienna, Austria. Teaching on Profound Meditation Stages from A-tri Teachings. Available online.
ai_summary: An intensive Bön Buddhist retreat on advanced meditation teachings by a senior lama in Vienna, available both in-person and online.

title: Dakini Tummo — Weekly Highest Yoga Tantra Classes
start_local_text: Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time / 8pm UK time
description_raw: Ongoing series of Tummo classes with emphasis on embodied and intuitive approach to Highest Yoga Tantra, welcoming to female practitioners. Beginning Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time, gathering weekly for guided practice followed by Q&A.
ai_summary: A weekly live Vajrayana Tummo class led by Gosia focusing on Generation and Completion Stage practices of Highest Yoga Tantra, with live sessions and recordings available through Circle.so.

title: Lung and Commentary on Dudjom Rinpoche's Short Ngöndro
description_raw: Lung (oral transmission) and tri (commentary) on Dudjom Rinpoche's short ngöndro being given on Chökor Düchen. Duration: 90 minutes. Prerequisite: samaya commitment to complete 111,111 recitations of each of the five accumulations within one year. Suggested minimum offering: $100.
ai_summary: An online Zoom teaching of Dudjom Rinpoche's condensed foundational practice (ngöndro), with oral transmission and commentary by Lama Pema Chöpel, requiring a year-long practice commitment from serious practitioners.

title: Tummo Practice Preliminaries (Weekend 1)
description_raw: Four-day teaching on Tummo practice preliminaries (continuation from 2025) delivered by Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche over two weekends in October 2026, on Zoom only.
ai_summary: A Zoom-based introduction to Tummo, an ancient Bon yogic and tantric practice for using inner heat to transform karma, illness, and emotional afflictions.

title: Tummo Practice Preliminaries (Weekend 2)
description_raw: Four-day teaching on Tummo practice preliminaries (continuation from 2025) delivered by Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche over two weekends in October 2026, on Zoom only.
ai_summary: A Zoom-based introduction to Tummo, an ancient Bon yogic and tantric practice for using inner heat to transform karma, illness, and emotional afflictions.

title: Exploring the Body of Light: Teachings on the Subtle Body
start_local_text: Sat. & Sun. July 25 & 26, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm both days (Central-Chicago Time)
description_raw: Khandro Kunzang gives an in-depth teaching on the subtle energy body according to Vajrayana Buddhist yogic teachings, covering channels, winds, perception, and their relationship to mind and emotions.
ai_summary: An online two-day workshop on the subtle body and energy channels in Vajrayana Buddhism, for practitioners interested in Buddhist tantra and yogic theory.

title: Teachings on Heart Sutra by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden
platform_detail: Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées (onsite and online livestream)
description_raw: Teachings by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden on Heart Sutra, hosted by Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées onsite and online from 25th July to 3rd August 2026 at 11am CET.
ai_summary: A multi-day hybrid teaching program on the Heart Sutra led by a senior Tibetan Buddhist teacher, available both in-person in the French Pyrenees and online.

title: Dakini Tummo - Highest Yoga Tantra Practice Series
start_local_text: Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time / 8pm UK time
description_raw: Weekly Tummo classes with emphasis on embodied and intuitive approach to Highest Yoga Tantra, encompassing Generation and Completion Stages, with Vajrayogini and Six Yogas of Naropa focus. Sessions available live or via recordings.
ai_summary: A weekly online Vajrayana practice series led by Gosia focusing on Highest Yoga Tantra (Tummo, Vajrayogini, and Six Yogas of Naropa), especially welcoming to female practitioners, with live sessions and recording access available.

title: Lung and Commentary on Dudjom Rinpoche's Short Ngondro
description_raw: Lung (oral transmission) and tri (commentary) on Dudjom Rinpoche's very short ngondro, given on the holy day of Chokor Duchan. Duration: 90 minutes. Prerequisite: commitment to complete 111,111 recitations of each of five accumulations within one year. Suggested offering: minimum $100.
ai_summary: An online Zoom transmission of an oral teaching on a concise preliminary practice (ngondro) designed for busy modern practitioners, offered by a senior teacher who has practiced it for 56 years; intended for serious practitioners willing to undertake a one-year completion vow.

title: Exploring the Body of Light: Teachings on the Subtle Body
start_local_text: Sat. & Sun. July 25 & 26, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm (Central-Chicago Time)
description_raw: In-depth teaching on the subtle energy body according to Vajrayana Buddhism, covering channels, winds, perception, and the effects of mantras on the subtle body.
ai_summary: A two-day online workshop on Buddhist tantric teachings about the subtle body, energy channels, and winds, led by Khandro Kunzang.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama is a complete yoga package combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation. Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche teaches these practices from the Indian and Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions online once a month.
ai_summary: A monthly online breathing and yoga meditation practice from the Tibetan tradition, led by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche, open to all levels.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama is a complete yoga package combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation. Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche teaches these practices from the Indian and Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions online once a month.
ai_summary: A monthly online breathing and yoga meditation practice from the Tibetan tradition, led by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche, open to all levels.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama is a complete yoga package combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation. Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche teaches these practices from the Indian and Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions online once a month.
ai_summary: A monthly online breathing and yoga meditation practice from the Tibetan tradition, led by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche, open to all levels.

title: Dakini Tummo — Weekly Practice Sessions
start_local_text: Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time / 8pm UK time
description_raw: Ongoing weekly Tummo classes emphasizing embodied and intuitive approach to Highest Yoga Tantra, encompassing Generation and Completion Stages, with a focus on Vajrayogini Generation Stage and the Six Yogas of Naropa.
ai_summary: A weekly live Vajrayana Highest Yoga Tantra practice group led by Gosia, welcoming especially female practitioners, with sessions available live or by recording via Circle.so community platform.

title: Dudjom Rinpoche Short Ngön-dro Lung and Commentary
description_raw: Lung (oral transmission) and tri (commentary) for Dudjom Rinpoche's short ngön-dro on the auspicious date of Chö-kor Düchen, with prerequisite commitment to complete 111,111 recitations of five accumulations within one year.
ai_summary: An online Zoom transmission and teaching of Dudjom Rinpoche's condensed foundational practice (ngön-dro) for serious Vajrayana practitioners committed to completing the practice.
